query:
INSERT INTO projects (slug, name, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES
  ('lexus-of-henderson', 'Lexus of Henderson', NOW(), NOW()),
  ('lexus-of-las-vegas', 'Lexus of Las Vegas', NOW(), NOW()),
  ('las-vegas-raiders-tour', 'Las Vegas Raiders Tour', NOW(), NOW()),
  ('centennial-subaru', 'Centennial Subaru', NOW(), NOW()),
  ('wondr-nation-g2e', 'Wondr Nation G2E', NOW(), NOW()),
  ('bob-marley-hope-road', 'Bob Marley Hope Road', NOW(), NOW()),
  ('sports-illustrated-sportsperson-2026', 'Sports Illustrated 2026', NOW(), NOW())
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = VALUES(name);
